stories.title: OpenAI 招聘面向家庭的产品经理，ChatGPT 深入家庭场景
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
stories.summary: OpenAI 正在招聘专门的“家庭产品经理”，负责为家庭、看护者和老年人设计 ChatGPT 体验。这表明 OpenAI 正将家庭用户作为重要增长方向。
stories.analysis: 家庭场景是 AI 应用的下一个蓝海，但需解决隐私、易用性和内容适龄问题。
stories.sourceExcerpt: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.

stories.title: Meta 关闭 Instagram 上允许用户对公开账号生成 AI 深度伪造的功能
stories.sourceTitle: Meta turns off the Instagram feature that let users make AI deepfakes of public accounts
stories.summary: 在争议后，Meta 关闭了本周刚推出的 Instagram 功能，该功能允许用户通过 @ 提及任何公开账号生成 AI 图像。此举表明平台对 AI 生成内容的监管更加谨慎。
stories.analysis: Meta 的快速转向说明公众对未经授权的 AI 生成内容容忍度很低。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Following significant backlash, Meta is turning off the feature it announced this week that let users generate AI images based on content from public Instagram accounts just by tagging them. The feature, as originally set up, meant that content from any public

stories.title: Instagram 负责人 Mosseri：如果你不喜欢 AI，就不该让它出现在你的 feed 中
stories.sourceTitle: Instagram’s Adam Mosseri: If you don’t like AI, ‘then you shouldn’t have it in your feed’
stories.summary: Instagram 负责人 Adam Mosseri 表示，虽然不会主动过滤 AI 内容，但用户可以通过“不感兴趣”等方式避免看到。这反映了平台对 AI 内容态度的复杂性。
stories.analysis: Mosseri 的表态暗示 Instagram 短期内不会全面打标或限制 AI 内容，用户体验调控权交给用户。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Though Instagram head Adam Mosseri doesn't want to filter out AI content on the platform, he argues that you "shouldn't have it in your feed" if you don't like it. "I don't think we should filter out AI content," Mosseri said during an interview on Lenny Rachi

stories.title: Sunrun 推出试点：让用户在自家安装 AI 计算单元，参与分布式数据中心
stories.sourceTitle: Would you host part of an AI data center in your home?
stories.summary: 太阳能和家庭储能公司 Sunrun 启动试点，向付费客户提供计算单元，期望将家庭变成分布式 AI 数据中心的一部分。这可能是 AI 基础设施模式的新探索。
stories.analysis: 分布式计算有助于降低数据中心能耗和成本，但家庭网络、散热和隐私是实际挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A solar and home energy storage company is expanding into AI data centers, but not by building one - instead, it's offering to pay its customers to put its compute units in their homes. Sunrun is launching a pilot program for a new "distributed AI compute" pro

stories.title: 微软 2025 年碳排放增加 25%，达 3400 万吨
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
stories.summary: 微软 2026 年可持续发展报告显示，2025 年碳排放同比上升 25%，达到 3400 万吨，背后可能与 AI 和云计算扩张有关。这给微软的气候承诺带来压力。
stories.analysis: AI 的能源消耗正在冲击科技公司的碳减排目标，未来可能需要更激进的清洁能源投资。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Microsoft may once again be struggling to keep up with its own climate goals, according to its 2026 sustainability report. As reported by GeekWire, the report states that Microsoft's carbon emissions increased 25 percent in 2025, totalling 34 million metric to

stories.title: OpenAI AGI 负责人 Fidji Simo 因病离职，转为兼职顾问
stories.sourceTitle: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
stories.summary: OpenAI 的 AGI 主管 Fidji Simo 因健康原因辞去全职职务，将以兼职顾问身份继续工作。她此前已因医疗原因请假数周。
stories.analysis: AGI 负责人的变动可能影响 OpenAI 的长期路线图，但核心团队仍在。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI's Fidji Simo is departing her full-time role as the company's AGI chief and is transitioning to being a "part-time advisor," she said on X. The news follows Simo's original announcement in April that she would take a few weeks of medical leave due to a

stories.title: Google 在广告中新增“由 AI 创建或编辑”标签
stories.sourceTitle: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
stories.summary: Google 宣布将在搜索、Discover 和 YouTube 的广告中标注“由 AI 创建或编辑”，用户可在“我的广告中心”查看。这是 AI 内容透明度的重要举措。
stories.analysis: Google 主动标注 AI 广告有助于建立用户信任，同时可能也为了应对未来监管。
stories.sourceExcerpt: You can see if ads on Google Search, Google Discover, and YouTube were made or edited using AI from a new section in Google's "My Ad Center," as reported earlier by TechCrunch. The update, announced on Thursday, adds a "created or edited with AI" label under t

stories.title: 微软利用 AI 扩大 Windows 11 更新覆盖面，后续补丁日内容更多
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft’s patch Tuesdays are about to get bigger
stories.summary: 微软表示已利用 AI 更早地识别潜在安全问题，未来 Windows 11 的“补丁星期二”将包含更多安全更新。AI 正成为系统安全运维的核心工具。
stories.analysis: AI 驱动的漏洞发现能力增强，但也意味着用户更新负担加重，企业需更快适应。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Windows 11 updates could soon include fixes for more security issues at once. Microsoft said in a blog post on Thursday that it's now using AI to "identify potential issues earlier," which means "customers will see a higher volume of security updates included

stories.title: 德国电信如何用 OpenAI 重塑电信业务
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: OpenAI News 文章介绍德国电信如何成为 AI 原生运营商，将 OpenAI 技术用于客服、员工工作流、网络运维及语音服务。
stories.analysis: 电信业 AI 转型正从客服向核心网络运维渗透，效率提升空间巨大。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: OpenAI Academy 与 Walton 基金会合作，为 K-12 教师提供 AI 技能培训
stories.sourceTitle: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
stories.summary: OpenAI Academy 与 Walton Family Foundation 合作举办动手 AI 技能研习营，帮助 K-12 教育工作者建立课堂实用 AI 技能。
stories.analysis: 教师 AI 素养是教育公平的关键，头部公司推动此类培训有助于扩大 AI 应用基础。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与 OpenAI 合作，目标成为 AI 原生组织
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建 AI 原生组织，改进内部工作流并规模化推出 AI 驱动的金融服务。
stories.analysis: 大型银行全面转向 AI 原生架构，标志着金融业 AI 采用进入新阶段。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: OpenAI 通过大规模 core dump 分析修复了一个 18 年历史的 bug
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: OpenAI 工程师利用大规模 core dump 分析技术，追踪罕见的底层基础设施崩溃，最终发现硬件故障和存在 18 年的软件 bug。
stories.analysis: 大规模 AI 推理的运维经验正在反哺传统软件工程，老问题在新场景下被曝光。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: OpenAI 推出 GeneBench-Pro，评估 AI 在基因组学与生物学中的表现
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: GeneBench-Pro 是一个新基准，使用复杂真实世界数据集测试 AI 在基因组学、生物学和科学研究中的能力。
stories.analysis: 此基准将推动 AI 在生命科学领域的标准化评估，加速临床和科研应用。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: OpenAI 详解 GeneBench-Pro 的生命科学评测方法
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: 文章深入介绍 GeneBench-Pro 的设计细节，旨在说明其如何科学地评估 AI 在生命科学任务上的能力。
stories.analysis: 基准透明度有助于科研社区信任和采用，但也可能暴露评测局限性。

stories.title: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 发布面向大模型推理的定制芯片 Jalapeño
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
stories.summary: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 联合推出名为 Jalapeño 的定制 AI 芯片，专门优化 LLM 推理性能、效率和可扩展性。
stories.analysis: 自研芯片是降低推理成本的关键，Jalapeño 将增强 OpenAI 的供应链控制力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

stories.title: OpenAI 推出 Patch the Planet 计划，帮助开源维护者修复漏洞
stories.sourceTitle: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
stories.summary: Daybreak 计划下的 Patch the Planet 旨在利用 AI 和专家审查帮助开源维护者发现、验证和修复安全漏洞。
stories.analysis: AI 辅助开源安全维护能缓解维护者过劳问题，但自动化修复的质量仍需要人工把关。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

stories.title: Google 在弗吉尼亚投资社区与能源项目，支撑数据中心扩张
stories.sourceTitle: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
stories.summary: Google 宣布在弗吉尼亚州进行新社区投资，包括支持本地就业和扩大能源可负担性，为数据中心和 AI 基础设施扩张做准备。
stories.analysis: AI 数据中心的能源与社区矛盾日益突出，此类投资是维持公共支持的必要之举。
stories.sourceExcerpt: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

stories.title: OpenAI 推理模型助力医生诊断儿童罕见遗传病，新增 18 个诊断
stories.sourceTitle: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
stories.summary: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型帮助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未确诊的病例中新识别出 18 个诊断。
stories.analysis: AI 在罕见病诊断中的应用体现了医学信息处理的独特价值，但临床验证仍需谨慎。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

stories.title: BBVA 将 ChatGPT Enterprise 推广至 10 万员工，与 OpenAI 合作加速银行 AI 转型
stories.sourceTitle: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
stories.summary: 西班牙对外银行 BBVA 将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展至 10 万员工，并与 OpenAI 合作推动全球银行业 AI 转型。
stories.analysis: 银行业大规模部署生成式 AI 的案例，表明核心业务场景正从辅助工具转向工作流融合。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

stories.title: Oracle 云用户可通过现有承诺额度访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
stories.sourceTitle: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
stories.summary: OpenAI 与 Oracle 合作，允许企业使用 Oracle 云的现有承诺额度来访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，保障企业级安全与治理。
stories.analysis: 多云策略让企业更容易采用 OpenAI 服务，同时满足合规和安全要求。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

stories.title: OpenAI 获政府批准公开发布 GPT-5.6，同时宣布“ChatGPT Work”
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’
stories.summary: 在经历约两周的受限预览后，OpenAI 获得特朗普政府许可，公开发布 GPT-5.6，并宣布推出面向工作场景的“ChatGPT Work”。
stories.analysis: 政府和 OpenAI 的审批博弈显示大模型发布正受到更多监管干预，但市场对更强模型需求旺盛。
stories.sourceExcerpt: About two weeks after OpenAI's GPT-5.6 was caught up in regulatory drama - rolled out only to government-approved organizations during a "limited preview" period - the company has received the Trump administration's greenlight for a public rollout of the model

stories.title: OpenAI 在密歇根启动 1GW 数据中心项目，作为 Stargate 计划一部分
stories.sourceTitle: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
stories.summary: OpenAI 在密歇根州破土动工建设 1GW 数据中心，作为 Stargate 计划的一部分，旨在扩展 AI 基础设施、创造就业并支持社区。
stories.analysis: 大规模数据中心建设是 AI 竞赛的基础，但选址和能耗问题将是长期挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

stories.title: 波士顿儿童医院用 AI 辅助诊断 40 多例罕见病，缓解运营负担
stories.sourceTitle: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
stories.summary: 波士顿儿童医院使用 OpenAI 技术改善患者护理、减轻运营负担，并帮助诊断了 40 多个罕见病案例。
stories.analysis: 医疗 AI 的落地验证了实际临床价值，但规模化推广仍需解决数据隐私和模型可靠性问题。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.

stories.title: OpenAI 公布政府与国家安全合作原则，强调负责任使用与公共安全
stories.sourceTitle: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
stories.summary: OpenAI 详细阐述其与政府和国家安全机构合作的方法论，包括负责任 AI 使用、民主问责和公共安全原则。
stories.analysis: 在国防合作日益敏感的背景下，此类透明化声明有助于缓解公众和监管担忧。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.

stories.title: 研究显示 400 万美国人用 ChatGPT 创办和运营小企业，AI 成“首名员工”
stories.sourceTitle: AI is becoming a first hire for small businesses
stories.summary: 新研究显示，约 400 万美国人使用 ChatGPT 启动、运营和扩展小企业，AI 降低了创业成本。
stories.analysis: AI 正在重塑小微企业的创业模式，但长期依赖可能影响人类技能传承。
stories.sourceExcerpt: New research shows how 4 million Americans use ChatGPT to start, run, and grow small businesses, lowering the cost of entrepreneurship with AI.

stories.title: 中国首个十万卡集群落成！全国产算力支撑“十万卡时代”
stories.sourceTitle: 中国首个十万卡集群落成！全国产算力支撑“十万卡时代”
stories.summary: 中国首个十万卡级算力集群已建成，全部使用国产算力，并已跑通 300 余项应用。这标志着中国 AI 基础设施进入新阶段。
stories.analysis: 十万卡集群的国产化意义重大，但实际训练效率和软硬件生态仍需验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 已跑通300余项应用

stories.title: 苹果发布 41 页 PDF 指责 OpenAI“偷师”其核心机密，引发热议
stories.sourceTitle: 苹果甩出41页PDF怒告OpenAI“偷师”其核心机密！网友：早知道就等印度开源了
stories.summary: 苹果公开一份 41 页文档，指控 OpenAI 涉嫌侵犯其核心技术机密。网友戏称“早知道等印度开源”。
stories.analysis: 该事件可能演变为知识产权纠纷，但具体指控是否成立取决于技术细节。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：通义千问推出首个实时 Token 流安全护栏模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen 团队发布 Qwen3Guard，基于 Qwen3 微调的安全护栏模型，专为实时 Token 流内容安全设计。
stories.analysis: AI 安全从后置过滤转向实时防护是趋势，Qwen3Guard 可服务开源社区和企业部署。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
